mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the labor market leads to an expansionary monetary policy response, causing the federal funds rate to decrease and increasing forward returns for S&P 500 stocks over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the labor market leads to a contractionary monetary policy response, causing the federal funds rate to increase and decreasing forward returns for S&P 500 stocks over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate signals an expansionary monetary policy response, causing the S&P 500 forward returns to decrease over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
